message:
✨ Add local search to list-based cards

- EventStream: Add search by message, object, namespace, type, cluster
- ActiveAlerts: Add local search for alert rules and messages
- HelmReleaseStatus: Add search for releases by name, namespace, chart
- ArgoCDApplications: Add search for apps by name, namespace, cluster, repo

All cards now support both global filter search AND local card-specific
search. Global search filters all cards simultaneously while local
search provides card-specific filtering.

Part of Phase 2, Item 23: Search in List Cards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
